name: Trumps
short_description: Trumps is a multiplayer card game. Players play suited cards to take tricks and score points to beat their opponents. The winning bidder sets the trump suit and takes lead control of the game. Can you outwit your opponents?
detailed_description: Work with your partner to outsmart your opponents in this suit-based card game. Trumps can be played solo with bots or multiplayer with up to 4 players; bots will fill in for any missing players. Place your bids based on how confident you are in the hand you were dealt. Try to take points that your opponents think they already have. Games are played to 300 points and typically last for 10-15 minutes.
